description: 审计定时 PR 监控任务的无效流量消耗、重复失败与冗余监控，提供一键停止与清理方案 | Audit scheduled PR watch cron tasks for invalid traffic burn, repeated failures, and duplicate monitors, with a one-click stop-and-cleanup plan.
author: VinceZ.辉

requires.auth: No authentication required. This skill reads local cron config and log files only.
permissions: read cron job config via cron/jobs.json
disable or delete cron tasks (only with explicit user confirmation)
